subcodes.first_line: O thou who calleth unto the Covenant! Be thou not sorrowful over the happenings of these days, nor dismayed by the wavering of the party of error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنادی الی المیثاق از حوادث ایام محزون مباش و از تزلزل حزب ضلال و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @firmness in the Covenant
